characters.appearance: Young woman with a fair complexion and long, wavy brown hair. She has soft, symmetrical facial features.
characters.wardrobe: A low-cut, ornate, light-colored dress with intricate lace detailing.
characters.demeanor: Serene, gazing directly at the viewer with a soft, slightly seductive expression.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: "Tell me about yourself." [Tell me about yourself.]
Unknown speaker says: "Sir, I... I am..." [Sir, I... I am...]
Unknown speaker says: English interview में ऐसे ही अटक जाते हो? [Do you get stuck like this in English interviews?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by simulating a stressful real-world scenario (job interview).
- Highlights the common problem of hesitating or freezing while speaking English.
- Sets up the need for a practical speaking solution rather than just reading.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ सिर्फ 10 मिनट में English बोलना सीखें (Learn to speak English in just 10 minutes a day)
AI Tutor के साथ (With AI Tutor)
सुनो (Listen)
बोलो (Speak)
सीखो (Learn)
Tell me about yourself.
Sir, I... I am...
to hesitate
[tu ˈhɛzɪteɪt]
हिचकिचाना (to hesitate)

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Supernova के AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करो। [Practice daily with Supernova's AI tutor.]
Unknown speaker says: ग़लतियाँ करने से मत डरो, यहाँ कोई judge नहीं करेगा। [Don't be afraid of making mistakes, no one will judge you here.]
Unknown speaker says: अपनी झिझक मिटाओ और confidence के साथ English बोलो। [Overcome your hesitation and speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor as a safe, non-judgmental space to practice speaking.
- Encourages the user to make mistakes and learn from them practically.
- Delivers the emotional payoff: speaking English fluently and with confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ सिर्फ 10 मिनट में English बोलना सीखें (Learn to speak English in just 10 minutes a day)

Interview Practice (Interview Practice)
सुनो (Listen)
बोलो (Speak)
सीखो (Learn)
I am a hardworking professional.
I have three years of experience.
confidence
[ˈkɒnfɪdəns]
आत्मविश्वास (confidence)
experience
[ɪkˈspɪəriəns]

professional
